title: Exact Age Calculator 2026 — Years, Months, Days, Hours | Hacé Cuentas
description: Exact age calculator: find your precise age in years, months, days, and hours. Calculate anyone's age. Free and instant.
intro: How many years, months, days, and hours old are you exactly? Beyond a rounded 'I'm 30,' this calculator gives you your **precise age instantly**: full years, months, days, hours, and even minutes lived.
keyTakeaway: Your age is not just a round number. This calculator shows you down to the **minutes lived** — ideal for fun facts and milestone celebrations.
useCases: You want to know your exact age today.
You need to calculate someone's age for paperwork.
You want to surprise someone with a precise birthday fact.
You're preparing a speech or post with interesting data.
You need an age in days for another calculation.

example.title: Example: Born June 15, 1990
example.result: You are exactly **35 years, 10 months, and 1 day old**. That's **13,089 days** or over **849,600 hours** lived.

explanation:
## How Exact Age Is Calculated

The calculator subtracts the birthdate from the current date and breaks it down into:

- **Full years**: cycles of 365/366 days.
- **Additional months**: complete months after the last birthday.
- **Remaining days**: stray days.
- **Hours and minutes**: multiplying from the total days.

### Fun Facts by Age

| Age | Days Lived | Hours |
|---|---|---|
| 1 year | 365 | 8,760 |
| 10 years | 3,652 | 87,648 |
| 20 years | 7,305 | 175,320 |
| 30 years | 10,957 | 262,968 |
| 40 years | 14,610 | 350,640 |
| 50 years | 18,262 | 438,288 |
| 75 years | 27,393 | 657,432 |
| 100 years | 36,524 | 876,576 |

### Days-Lived Milestones

- **10,000 days**: ~27 years 5 months
- **20,000 days**: ~54 years 9 months
- **25,000 days**: ~68 years 5 months
- **30,000 days**: ~82 years 1 month

## Leap Years

The calculator correctly handles leap years. If you were born on February 29, your 'official' birthday is counted as 02/28 or 03/01 in non-leap years.

## Tip: Your Age in Other Formats

You can surprise people by saying 'I'm 11,000 days old' instead of '30 years old.' It's a great fact for social media — same time, different perception.

faq.q: How do I calculate my exact age?
faq.a: Enter your **date of birth** and the calculator subtracts it from today's date. You get exact years, months, days, hours, and minutes.
Yes, the calculator correctly handles **February 29** and leap years in the total day count.

faq.q: How many days does a 30-year-old have?
faq.a: Approximately **10,957 days** (including leap years). That's more than **262,000 hours**.

faq.q: When do I turn 10,000 days old?
faq.a: At about 27 years and 5 months. Enter your date of birth and check 'Days lived' — hitting 10,000 is a cool milestone to celebrate.

faq.q: Can I use it to calculate someone else's age?
faq.a: Yes, you can enter **any date of birth**. It works for calculating the age of family members, friends, pets, etc.

faq.q: Why is my age in days more impactful than in years?
faq.a: Because **large numbers** create more psychological impact. '11,000 days' sounds much bigger than '30 years' — same time, different perception.

faq.q: Can I know how many hours I've slept in my life?
faq.a: Approximation: an adult sleeps ~8 hours/day. Multiply your days lived by 8 and you get an estimate. With 10,000 days lived, you've slept ~80,000 hours (~9 years).

howToSteps.name: Enter your date of birth
howToSteps.text: Select your complete date of birth.

howToSteps.name: Click Calculate
howToSteps.text: Press the "Calculate" button to get your exact age.

howToSteps.name: Review the results
howToSteps.text: Review your age broken down into years, months, days, hours, and minutes.
